project_type: React+TypeScript board game SPA with Vite
verification_instructions: Run npx vite build and confirm it succeeds with no errors
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is build-only.
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit when done.
key_patterns: Single CSS file (src/App.css) with minified styles. Components in src/components/. State managed by zustand in src/store/gameStore.ts. Clan colors accessed via CLANS array. Figure tooltip uses .figure-tooltip class with border: 1.5px solid var(--accent-gold).
directory_structure: Root: src/ with components/, store/, types/, img/, utils/, i18n/. All styling in src/App.css (single file, long lines). Build outputs to dist/.
